content:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "Which of the following is a characteristic of a Deterministic Finite Automaton (DFA)?",
      "options": ["A) It can be in multiple states at the same time", "B) It can make choices based on the input symbol", "C) It can only be in one state at a time", "D) It can go back in time to previous input symbols"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "A DFA can only be in one state at a time and it always makes a choice based on the current input symbol"
